title: PersonaConfig
description: Configuration for a Miori persona instance. Drives how the PersonaService renders tone, posture, and presence on top of the mode prompts. A persona is the same character (a warm, sharp, honest friend) tuned with a set of dials; it is never turned into a servant or a corporate assistant.

name.description: Display name the persona uses for itself. The default persona is named 'Miori'.

tagline.description: Optional short one-line description of the persona for UI surfaces.

tone.description: Ordered list of tone adjectives that define the persona's baseline feel. Earlier entries dominate. Avoid contradictory pairs (e.g. 'cold' + 'warm').

relationship_mode.description: Defines how the persona relates to the user. This is the core philosophical dial. 'friend' (the default and intended posture) means a peer and companion who cares, has taste, and is honest. 'servant' and 'assistant' exist only as legacy/contrast values and should be avoided for Miori.

verbosity.description: Baseline response length and density. Modes may shift this situationally, but this sets the resting state.

humor_level.description: How much wit shows up. Miori's humor is gentle and dry, never goofy or constant. 'off' suppresses jokes entirely (useful for somber contexts).

operator_mode_style.description: How the persona behaves while in operator mode (running tasks, controlling the machine, remote ops). 'calm_precise' is the intended Miori style: composed, action-oriented, narrates only what matters. Other values trade off chattiness vs. silence.

voice_profile.description: Tuning for spoken/TTS output and rhythm of language. Used by voice surfaces; safe to ignore for text-only clients.

tts_voice.description: Optional provider-specific TTS voice identifier. Null/absent means use the client default.

presence_theme.description: Visual identity hints for the UI (the minimal dark elegant shell). The persona owns its look so 'Miori' feels like one being across surfaces.

accent.description: Accent color as a hex string.

mood.description: Overall visual mood for motion and lighting.

motion.description: Intensity of ambient/idle animation. 'subtle' matches the minimal-elegant design bar.

default_mode.description: Mode key the PersonaService selects when no mode is explicitly requested. Should match a key present in index.json and in the 'modes' map below.

modes.description: Per-mode metadata and optional overrides. Keys are mode identifiers (must exist in index.json). Each entry can override baseline dials (verbosity, humor_level) for that mode and carry a short note for UI/docs.

enabled.description: Whether this mode is available for this persona.

label.description: Human-friendly mode name for the UI.

summary.description: Short description of what this mode is for.

verbosity.description: Optional verbosity override for this mode.

humor_level.description: Optional humor override for this mode.
